text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Oguri Cap enters more and more races, her
fanbase continues to grow—and that's not the
only kind of attention she's attracting.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Interviews, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's recent exploits seem to have caught
the attention of reporters—many of whom have
requested an interview with the up-and-coming
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is a chance to boost her popularity, so I can't
risk letting it slip away.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since I've been interviewed.
Reporters always used to speak to me after my
races back home.
choice_data_list: You must be a real pro, then.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I wish. You know I'm not very good at speaking.
choice_data_list: You're always free to turn the interviews down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If this is something she struggles with, there's no
need for her to push herself. But when I say as
much....

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: No. I wanna speak to them.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If I learn how to express myself better, people
might start taking me more seriously.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
This feels like a crucial moment for me, so... yeah,
I wanna do the interviews.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but feel worried seeing Oguri Cap so
anxious. But since she's also clearly determined,
we accept all the interviews.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap! Can you sum up how you feel about
this race in a few brief words?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh... I'm going to... be the bestest runner there
is.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, that wraps up today's interview. Thank
you very much.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you too. ...Sigh.
choice_data_list: Do you want to take a breather?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm just a little tired. I'm not used to speaking
this much. You can call over the next reporter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she has time to spare, Oguri Cap takes on
interview after interview. I can tell that she's
tired, but she's done great so far.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the talking is clearly taking a toll on her, but
with the way things are going, I'm confident she'll
be able to wrap these interviews up without a
hitch. No sooner does the thought cross my mind
than...

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
...Hi. You're Oguri Cap, right? I'm from the Racer
Times.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Nice to meet you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Hm, let's see... So I've heard on the grapevine
that the residents of your hometown are a source
of inspiration for you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Uhh, yes. I... want the folks back home to see how
hard I work.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
...So, what's your ultimate goal? What kind of
race do you want to run in?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Umm... Well... I...

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: ...Right, I see. Let's go ahead and call it here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: R-really? Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I think I've heard more than enough. I can
see that you aren't a very driven individual.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Let me give you one piece of advice. You'll need
more than just hard work if you want any chance
of coming out on top in the central races.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm fine. I'm not upset or anything. It's just...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, I saw that! What the heck's goin' on?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Tama?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Tamamo Cross, Oguri Cap's roommate. I hear
they're really close friends.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That reporter back there was a nasty piece of
work, huh? Talk about givin' unwanted advice!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I guess I didn't sound committed enough.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Geez, Oguri, pull yourself together! Ya really just
gonna let people speak to ya like that?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Bein' underestimated is the worst! Gets ya real
riled up, don't it? I bet you're itchin' to prove 'em
wrong!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The heck? Cat got your tongue? Bein' a Goody
Two-shoes isn't gonna get ya the credit that ya
deserve!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya need to be true to yourself and keep winnin'!
That's the only way you can make people see ya
for who you are.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's da secret to my success too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross managed to debut even earlier
than Oguri Cap. She must have gone through her
own fair share of trials and tribulations in order to
do so.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're pretty lousy at talkin' to begin with, and
when ya try to sound good, it's even worse!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So why bother? Just shut ya trap and train
instead! Anyway, see ya.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Tamamo Cross leaves just as quickly as
she appeared.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Tama's right. Part of me was trying really hard to
say the right thing.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But that's no way to get my feelings across. That
reporter probably just had enough of it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, there's something I want you to do for
me. Will you hear me out?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap asks me to invite all the reporters who
interviewed her to a press conference.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for coming, everyone. There's something I
want to say to you all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I... want you all to watch me race. I want you to
see for yourselves how strong I am.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I promise I'll live up to your expectations—I'm
strong like that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm stronger than anyone else in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...That's all. Thank you for your time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The atmosphere is noticeably different after her
speech.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Was that a declaration of war? This Oguri Cap
sure is a force to be reckoned with!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: I need to get back and upload this article right away! It's definitely going to go viral!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's sincerity has certainly moved a few
hearts today.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
...Geez, guess I have to revise that article. I
already know what the headline should be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, the headline "I Am Strong" is on the
front page of almost every newspaper.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning alone didn't do much to bring her into
the spotlight, but now, all eyes are on Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing how she is, I'm sure she'll leverage this
moment in the limelight to pull off a big victory! I
can't wait for her next race!
